extra.reasoning: rec_drug_a is set true only by r1; rec_drug_b only by r4. r1's 12-conjunct guard includes pregnancy=true, and r4's guard is exactly pregnancy=true. Hence any input satisfying r1 necessarily satisfies r4, so both rec_drug_a and rec_drug_b become true. No other rule or default can suppress a rule-set true output (defaults only apply to outputs left unset). Setting all 12 of r1's conjuncts true (seizure_history/hypertension irrelevant) makes r1 fire (rec_drug_a=true) and r4 fire (rec_drug_b=true), violating the mutual-exclusion property (rec_drug_a and rec_drug_b not jointly true).
